decision_trail.reason: Blueprint PM already defined 4-phase delivery order, mapping to MVP/Usable/Refined
decision_trail.impact: 3 milestones × 1 phase each, minimizing synchronization barriers

decision_trail.decision: CLI Adapter as Phase 1 Wave 1 priority
decision_trail.reason: Without adapter, no integration with maestro-flow is possible

decision_trail.decision: Per-client translation is acceptable for MVP (<100 clients)
decision_trail.reason: MVP is single-user local app, not multi-tenant SaaS
decision_trail.impact: No architectural change needed; defer perf optimization to Refined milestone

decision_trail.decision: Windows ConPTY risk is medium, not blocking
decision_trail.reason: Phase 1 doesn't require interactive PTY (Terminal Bridge is Phase 2)
decision_trail.impact: Defer to Phase 2 validation; Phase 1 uses child_process.spawn for delegate commands

key_conclusions.conclusion: Phase 1 architecture is sound — EventBus → WSGateway → StateSync → Translator 分层合理，依赖方向正确
CLI Adapter Layer 是 Phase 1 最大缺口 — 当前实现无法与 maestro-flow 交互
测试覆盖不均匀 — EventBus 和 Translator 有完整测试，WSGateway/StateSync/Server 无测试
evidence: exploration-codebase.json: no __tests__ for ws-gateway, state-sync, index

key_conclusions.conclusion: maestro-flow 集成点已识别但未对接 — ralph skills NDJSON + delegate broker 需在 plan 阶段细化

recommendations.action: 实现 CLI Adapter Layer — 解析 maestro ralph skills --json NDJSON 输出，封装为 WorkflowMeta[]
recommendations.rationale: Workflow Commander 和 Project Radar 的数据源完全依赖此适配器
recommendations.next_action: plan 阶段设为 Wave 1 首个任务

recommendations.action: 实现 maestro delegate 子进程管理 — spawn + 输出流解析 + 事件发射
recommendations.rationale: 工作流执行必须通过 delegate 命令触发，这是 Phase 1 的核心功能
recommendations.next_action: plan 阶段设为 Wave 3 任务（依赖 CLI Adapter）

recommendations.action: 补充 WSGateway 和 StateSyncEngine 单元测试
recommendations.rationale: 当前 0% 覆盖率，集成风险高
recommendations.next_action: 与对应模块开发同步完成

recommendations.action: 基准测试 WS per-client 翻译性能 — 100 clients × 10 events/sec
recommendations.rationale: 确认单用户场景下无瓶颈，为多用户扩展做准备

recommendations.action: 设计 maestro-flow 版本检测机制 — 启动时 maestro --version 解析 + 适配器选择
recommendations.rationale: 防止 CLI 输出格式变更导致适配器失败
recommendations.next_action: 与 CLI Adapter 同步设计

implementation_scope.objective: 实现 CLI Adapter Layer — NDJSON 解析 + 版本检测
acceptance_criteria: 能正确解析 maestro ralph skills --json --quiet 输出
启动时检测 maestro 版本并选择匹配适配器
版本不匹配时 fail-fast 并返回清晰错误

implementation_scope.objective: 实现 delegate 子进程管理 + 输出流解析
acceptance_criteria: 能 spawn maestro delegate 子进程并捕获 stdout/stderr
能解析 delegate broker 事件（queued, started, completed, failed）
进程退出时正确清理资源

implementation_scope.objective: 补充 WSGateway + StateSyncEngine 单元测试
acceptance_criteria: WSGateway 测试覆盖：连接/断开/订阅/取消订阅/模式切换/广播
StateSyncEngine 测试覆盖：双源合并/debounce/缓冲区/replay
